I'm a Lead Application Developer based in Melbourne, Australia. Over 11+ years I've worked across insurance, logistics, mobility, and retail — building distributed systems and cloud infrastructure that power products at scale.

My work has spanned ThoughtWorks, Rapido (India's largest bike-taxi platform), Australia Post, and now Fabric Group — where I lead a team of 6 engineers delivering AWS serverless platforms for enterprise clients.

I care most about the decisions that are hard to undo: system architecture, data modelling, team structure. I like working on problems where the blast radius of a wrong call is measured in millions of users.
